responses: 🌱 Hello! Welcome to the Smart Greenhouse Bot! How can I help you today?
👋 Hi there! Great to see you! Do you need help with gardening or greenhouse monitoring?
Hello and welcome! 🌿 Your farming assistant is here! Ask me about plants or environmental conditions
🌡️ The current temperature in the greenhouse is {temperature}°C.
The temperature is {temperature}°C. If it goes above 30°C, we need to open the windows! 🌬️
Currently: {temperature}°C. The ideal temperature for plants is between 20-25°C 🌡️
💧 The current humidity level is {humidity}%. Plants like humidity between 60-80% 🌱
Air humidity is {humidity}%! If it's below 50%, we need to increase watering 💦
Status: {humidity}% humidity. This is good for growth! 💧
☀️ The current light intensity is {light} lux. Plants need 10000-30000 lux for good growth 🌿
Light is at {light} lux. If it's below 10000, we need to add artificial light 💡
Light status: {light} lux ☀️ This is excellent for growth! Need more?
💧 The current soil moisture is {soil}%. The ideal range is between 40-60% 🌱
The soil has {soil}% moisture. If it's below 40%, we need to water more! 💦
Soil status: {soil}% moisture. This is good! 🌿
💦 Watering is best done every 2-3 days depending on the weather! Make sure the soil is slightly dry before watering 🌱
For watering plants, do it at dawn or evening! Avoid watering at midday ☀️💧
Plants need watering when soil moisture is below 40%! Use drip irrigation system 💧🌿
Ideal schedule: water every 2 days in summer, and every 4-5 days in winter ❄️💦

🌱 Important tips:
•Monitor temperature and humidity daily
•Ensure good ventilation
•Use fertilizer monthly
•Check plants regularly for pests 🐛

💡 For farming success:
1. Choose a sunny location
2. Prepare the soil before planting
3. Water regularly but don't overwater
4. Add organic fertilizer 🌿

My advice to you:
•Monitor weather constantly
•Don't overwater 💧
•Use mulch to protect soil
•Harvest at the right time! 🌾
The most important thing: love and patience! 🌱 Plants feel the care. Tend to them and they will bear fruit! 🍅🥕

🍅 Tomato information:
•Ideal temperature: 20-25°C
•Soil moisture: 50-70%
•Light: 6-8 hours of direct sunlight
•Watering: regular but not excessive 💧

Tomato tips:
•Plant in soil rich in fertilizer
•Keep 60-70cm distance between seedlings
•Tie plants for support
•Harvest when color turns red! 🌿🔴

Tomatoes need:
☀️ Full sun
💧 Regular watering
🌡️ Warm temperature
🪴 Space to grow
Harvest when fruit is firm and red! 🍅

Problem symptoms:
•Yellow, wilted leaves = too much water
•Cracked fruits = irregular watering
•Pale leaves = needs fertilizer! 🌱

🌶️ Pepper information:
•Ideal temperature: 25-30°C
•Soil moisture: 60-70%
•Light: full sun
•Watering: moderate and regular 💧

Pepper tips:
•Plant in sunny, wind-protected location
•Add potassium-rich fertilizer
•Harvest when fruit is firm
•Hot peppers need higher temperature! 🌡️🌶️

Peppers need:
☀️ High temperature 25-30°C
💧 Good humidity
🌱 Well-draining soil
🪴 Large pots for growth
Harvest at maturity! 🌶️

Pepper problems:
•Purple leaves = too cold
•Small fruits = needs fertilizer
•Flower drop = water stress
Check these signs! 🌿

🩹 Initial diagnosis:

🔴 Brown spots on leaves = fungus
Solution: Remove diseased leaves and spray fungicide

🟡 Yellow leaves = nutrient deficiency or overwatering
Solution: Check watering and add fertilizer

⚪ White spots = powdery mildew
Solution: Better ventilation and fungicide 🌿

🤒 Common symptoms and treatment:

•Wilted leaves = Thirsty! 💧 Add water
•Pale leaves = Needs Nitrogen! 🌱 Add fertilizer
•Black spots = Root rot = Reduce watering
•Drooping = Too hot = Ventilate! 🌬️

Prevention is better than cure! 🛡️

✅ Good ventilation
✅ Don't overwater
✅ Inspect plants daily
✅ Use clean pots
✅ Use sterile soil
✅ Monitor for early disease signs! 🌱

For common diseases:

🍂 Root rot: Reduce water and ensure drainage
🦟 Aphids: Spray soap or insecticidal soap
🍄 Fungi: Fungicides
🦠 Wilt: Remove infected plant!

Consult an expert if it persists! 👨‍🌾

🤖 I'm the Smart Greenhouse Bot! I can help you with:

🌡️ Temperature readings
💧 Humidity monitoring
☀️ Light checking
💧 Soil moisture testing
🌱 Farming advice
🍅 Tomato and pepper information
🔍 Disease diagnosis

Ask me anything! 🌿

Here's what I can do:

1️⃣ Query environmental conditions
2️⃣ Watering and fertilizer tips
3️⃣ Plant information
4️⃣ Problem diagnosis
5️⃣ Planting schedule

Just ask! 💡

Hello! I'm your smart farming assistant 🌱

📊 I can:
•Give you sensor readings
•Tips for successful growth
•Watering and fertilizer guidance
•Crop information
•Disease diagnosis help

What would you like to know? 💬

😅 Sorry, I didn't understand your question! 💭

Try:
•Asking about temperature or humidity
•Requesting farming tips
•Asking about tomatoes or peppers
•Say help for assistance! 🌱

🤔 I'm not sure what you mean! 😕

I can help you with:
•🌡️ Temperature
•💧 Humidity
•☀️ Light
•💧 Soil moisture
•🌱 General tips

Ask in a different way! 💬

😇 My apologies! Please be more specific

For example:
•What's the temperature
•Give me a tip
•What do tomatoes need
•What do yellow leaves mean

I'm here to help! 🌿

📚 Unknown question! ❓

Ask about:
→Environmental conditions temperature, humidity, light
→Watering and fertilizer tips

Try again! 💪
